title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 644.599 - Board may borrow additional $20,000,000 for purposes of storm water control
text:
644.599.  Board may borrow additional $20,000,000 for purposes of storm water control. — In addition to those sums authorized prior to August 28, 2007, the board of fund commissioners of the state of Missouri, as authorized by Section 37(h) of Article III of the Constitution of the State of Missouri, may borrow on the credit of this state the sum of twenty million dollars in the manner described, and for the purposes set out, in chapter 640 and in this chapter.
(L. 2007 S.B. 22)
